task_name: Tampa City Council – Extract Budget Discussions
notes: Excellent extraction and report. Agent captured all expected budget items with precise dollar amounts ($3B water investment, $170M grants, $1,020/$1,237/$1,530/$1,847 fees, $1.5-2M/yr revenue, $94M Rome Yard Phase 4, $34.2M Howard Annex, $8M Zion Cemetery, $650K FGT settlement, $8/$8 pipes program, GMP May 15 Fire Station, etc.). Each section includes detailed context, council concerns, debate, and actions. Financial summary table consolidates 29 distinct items. Well-organized, no omissions detected, and no extraneous content. Minor: duplicate files created (budget_report.md and budget_report_1.md appear identical), but deliverable fully meets and exceeds task requirements.
